titleStmt.title: SII 22.25: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 25. (A.R. No. 25 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH BASE OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. RĀJAK. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA I—26th YEAR. (A.D. 1095-6)

summary.p: The inscription begins with expression Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga etc., It registers an endowment of two pieces of land making up 2(3/4) vēli in extent by the sabhā of Tirukkaḍavūr, for the maintenance of some Śivayōgis attached to a maṭha called the Kuṅgiliyakkalai[yar-maḍam] in the temple, which was evidently established by one Paḻandīparāyaṉ of Śiṟṟāmūr, and for the requirements of worship during the ardhayāma and the paḷḷi-eḻuchchi services in the temple. The gift is said to have been made for the well-being of the king's person. The record is incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅkac cayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟc ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara vikkalan ciṅkaṇaṉ
kaṭalpāya ttikkaṉaittum taṉ cakkara naṭātti virasiṅhāsanattup puvana muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruṉtaruḷiya kovirājakesarivanmarāna tiripuvanaccakkara vattikaḷ [śrī kulottuṅkacoḻa tevaṟku]
yāṇṭu 2 10 6Āvatu rājanārāyaṇavaḷanāṭṭu Amparnāṭṭu Uḷp paṭai Eviya tirukkaṭavūr mahāsabhaiyom ciṟṟāmūruṭaiyānāna paḻaṉtiparājarkku nāṅkaḷ dharmmaśā
ḷūrai naṭuviṭṭu Oṭina kaṭalāṭi Āṟu Iṟaṅki vallār tūrattu paṉniraṇṭāntarattil vanta maṭakku kiṟukka Iṟaipeṟa Iṭṭukkoṇṭu Iṟukkap peṟṟu Ippaṭikku Eṟaṭṭuk koḷvāriṉṟi Oṭai
nta nilam karuṇākaravatikku meṟku rājentiracoḻan vāykkālukku teṟku muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcatirattu viṭṭa nilam 1i Iṉnilam Onṟaraiyum viḷai nilamākat tirutti kuṅkiliyakkalai
vacokikaḷai Uṇṇappaṇṇak kaṭavarākavum viṭṭa tirukkaḻippālai Uṭaiyān viḷāka nilam 1i viṭṭu Iṉnam tiruattacāmappuṟamum tiruppaḷḷi yeḻiccippuṟamummāka viṭṭa tirukka
vatu tiripuvaṉamātevivatikku meṟku Arumoḻitevan vāykkālukku teṟku mutal catirattu māvaṟutikku meṟku rājendracoḻavāykkālukku teṟku nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu ma
nilattukku kiḻakku paḻavāṟṟil niroṭu kāl nikki Oṭaiyum Uṭaippum paṭukaiyu māponamāyk kiṭanta nilattil tirukkaḻippālai Uṭaiyān macakkalen
5 cār nilamum Āka nilam Iraṇṭe mukkālum viḷainilamākat tirutti kuṭutta nilam cakkaravattikaḷ [śrī]kulottuṅkacoḻadevar tirumeni kaliyāṇa tirumeṉi The inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 22.25 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
